nasb.text: So he built the house and finished it; and he covered the house with beams and planks of cedar.

esv.text: So he built the house and finished it, and he made the ceiling of the house of beams and planks of cedar.

cnv.text: 所羅門建殿，建造完成以後，就用香柏木的棟梁和香柏木的木板做殿的天花板。

ccb.text: 殿建成后，殿顶装上香柏木的梁木和木板。
